JUDGE CHOPPELAS ALL PARTIES PRESENT, ALL IN PRO PER 10:50 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD BY PLTF. AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFTS FOR RESTIT. OF THE PREMISES AT ROOM 511, ALDER HOTEL, 175 6TH ST, SF. CA 94103. DEFTS TO VACATE PREMISES ON 11/7/93. $1,000 RENTS. NO ATTYS FEES & COSTS. IF DEFTS VACATE BY 11/7/93, $1,000 IS WAIVED AS WELL AS THE COSTS/FEES. PLTF. TO PREPARED JUDGMENT.
